calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement, Or In The Alternative, To Vacate Default; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Benjamin Hool, 415.324.8860 of Holl Law and Mediation appearinf via Court call for Defendant Janet Fowler.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JANET FOWLER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO VACATE DEFAULT is OFF CALENDAR, moot. Dismissal on file. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Benjamin Holl, 415.324.8860 of Holl Law and Mediation appearinf via Court call for Defendant Janet Fowler.
No other appearances.

Argued. Mr. Holl requests $5700 in sanctions.

The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT JANET FOWLER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is Granted in the amount of $2,000. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
